title: The Giants of Thessaly
writer: Giuseppe Masini, Mario Rossetti, Riccardo Freda
actors: Roland Carey, Ziva Rodann, Alberto Farnese
plot: In order to placate the angry gods, who have allowed Thessaly to be overrun with barbarian invaders and beset with natural disasters, King Jason takes his Argonauts on a search for the fabled Golden Fleece. Meanwhile, back at home...
